objective: Close F-0172 statically by deriving one versioned, bounded and immutable AI scoring question context from the authoritative published paper snapshot, preserving paper_section/question_group/material facts through RAG, durable task input and the governed scoring runner without trusting caller-supplied context.
blockedFiles: any schema or migration source, real database/data access, Provider configuration/credential/network call, prompt registry or template change, permission, quota, dependency, deployment, secret/env, external service, PR or force-push

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: published paper snapshot hierarchy -> mock_exam immutable paper snapshot -> canonical AI scoring question context -> RAG query and durable ai_scoring_task input_snapshot -> governed scoring runner
preRedImpactScan.currentVulnerableSink: mock-exam flattening discards paper_section/question_group/material context before building the scoring command; RAG and AiScoringRunner consume only stem, answers and scoring points
preRedImpactScan.securityInvariant: only a server-derived, strictly validated and bounded context tied to the exact paperQuestionPublicId/questionPublicId may reach retrieval, durable execution or a scoring runner; malformed, legacy-incomplete or cross-group facts fail closed before Provider/executor
preRedImpactScan.legitimateBehavior: standalone subjective questions use an explicit null questionGroup; grouped questions preserve their immutable material and group membership; objective scoring and existing durable lifecycle remain unchanged

requiredSemantics.singleContract: one schemaVersion=1 scoring question context builder/validator is consumed by mock submit, RAG, durable task validation and direct governed runner; no duplicate or optional caller map
requiredSemantics.identity: context binds exact paperQuestionPublicId and questionPublicId plus paper_section publicId/title/sortOrder; grouped context also binds question_group publicId/title/sortOrder and the exact ordered group paperQuestionPublicId set
requiredSemantics.material: grouped questions require the immutable material snapshot publicId/title/contentRichText/profession/level/subject; standalone questions require questionGroup=null and cannot receive synthetic material
requiredSemantics.bounds: public identities are non-empty and at most 200 UTF-16 code units; section, group and material titles are non-empty and at most 2000 UTF-16 code units; material content reuses MAX_MATERIAL_RICH_TEXT_LENGTH=30000; group question count is 1..PAPER_QUESTION_COUNT_LIMIT=100; malformed, sparse, duplicate, cross-profession/level/subject or mismatched identity fails closed
requiredSemantics.rag: retrieval query deterministically includes immutable material title/content and section/group titles before question/answer/scoring-point facts, without reading current material or accepting client context
requiredSemantics.durable: the preparer persists a detached canonical context; ai-scoring-task runtime revalidates it before executor and passes only the canonical detached context; corrupted/missing context records a stable non-retryable failure with zero executor/success persistence
requiredSemantics.runner: AiScoringService validates the same context and includes it in the runner input; invalid context produces stable redacted scoring failure with zero runner invocation
requiredSemantics.legacy: legacy or incomplete grouped snapshot cannot be guessed or silently scored without material; it fails closed. Existing already-persisted terminal success remains immutable read-only replay
requiredSemantics.scope: no Provider network/configuration/prompt change, schema/migration, permission, quota, dependency, UI/API capability or current-tree lookup

validationEvidence.tddRed: 5 suites executed; 8 expected failures proved missing builder, mock propagation, RAG segmentation, direct runner validation, durable validation and context-bound idempotency
validationEvidence.focused: pass: 9 existing test files and 118 tests; the approved contingency path src/server/repositories/ai-scoring-task-repository.test.ts does not exist and was not materialized
validationEvidence.lint: pass with 0 errors and 3 pre-existing unrelated warnings
validationEvidence.build: pass with pre-existing Next output-tracing warning
validationEvidence.stateParse: pass with WIP=1 and 15 actual changed paths all inside the 19-file envelope
validationEvidence.adversarialReview: pass: strict versioned source, exact identity/scope, frozen boundaries, sparse/duplicate/case/control/unicode rejection, deep copy, context-bound idempotency, explicit executor allowlist, zero runner/executor on invalid context, untrusted JSON-encoded RAG segments, terminal replay unchanged
validationEvidence.runtimeBoundary: static and synthetic only; no real Provider, database or browser runtime proof
